name: Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together.
2. Add onion and cream-style corn to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. If necessary, add a small amount of milk to achieve the desired consistency.
4. Using a spoon or scoop, drop heaping teaspoons of batter into deep hot fat.
5. Fry until golden brown. (When cooked in deep fat, they will float to the top.)
6. Yields 10 to 12 hush puppies.
